name: test_file_path
description: Test file path relative to repo root, e.g. packages/workflow/test/cron.test.ts. Forms part of the composite primary key.

name: source_file_path
description: Source file Stryker mutates, relative to repo root, e.g. packages/workflow/src/cron.ts. Forms part of the composite primary key.

name: package
description: pnpm workspace package name, e.g. n8n-workflow.

name: last_score
description: Most recent mutation score as a percentage 0-100. NULL for status=new rows that have not yet been scored.

name: threshold_at_run
description: The mutation-score threshold in effect at the time of the most recent run. Recorded so historical green/red verdicts remain interpretable as the threshold evolves.

name: last_checked_at
description: When the most recent Stryker run completed. NULL for status=new rows.

name: last_checked_sha
description: Git SHA the most recent Stryker run was performed against.

name: status
description: Worklist state: new | green | red | stale. See README for state transitions.

name: origin
description: How the test file was authored: ai-generated | human-written. AI-generated rows let us track quality drift of generated tests over time.

name: attempts
description: Number of AI refinement iterations on the most recent run (Phase 3). 0 or NULL for human-written rows.

name: mutants_killed
description: Mutants killed in the most recent run.

name: mutants_survived
description: Mutants that survived the most recent run. The interesting denominator for AI loop feedback.

name: mutants_no_coverage
description: Mutants not covered by any test in the most recent run.

name: mutants_timeout
description: Mutants that timed out (counted as detected for scoring purposes).
